  "findings": [
    "Unpoured explosion-proof sealing fitting (visible fill hole plug but no compound poured)",
    "Potential pathway for flammable gases, vapors, or ignitible dusts to migrate through the conduit system"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove the fill plug, verify damming fiber is correctly packed, mix and pour approved sealing compound, and reinstall the plug tightly."
  ],
  "rationale": "An unpoured seal in a classified area fails to isolate the conduit system, presenting an immediate explosion hazard if flammable gases or vapors migrate. Although the physical fitting is installed (rough-complete), it is non-compliant and defective until the compound is poured and cured.",

    "NEC Article 505.16"
  ]
